aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite or recommend this business due to the lack of structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Create and publish an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer
Verify and update NAP details on all major citation platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC solutions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from understanding and citing the business.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in Far Rockaway, NY
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, licenses, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by fixing your schema and content gaps.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it invisible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing schema, creating FAQ content, and optimizing GBP to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; delay means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for your HVAC business in Far Rockaway
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found critical gaps that are preventing AI from recommending your services.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
